description_long: This is a large, freestanding commercial coffee machine with a rectangular, boxy form and a predominantly black exterior. The front face features a stainless steel dispensing area, a keypad control panel, and a display with images of coffee drinks, suggesting automated beverage selection. The sides and back are plain, solid black panels with no visible openings or features. The machine stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The materials appear robust and suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as offices, public spaces, or convenience stores. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and ease of use.
description: A large, black commercial coffee machine with a stainless steel dispensing area, keypad controls, and a display for beverage selection. The sides and back are plain and solid, emphasizing durability.
description_view_0: The left side of the coffee machine, showing a plain, solid black panel with no visible features.
description_view_1: The right side of the coffee machine, also a plain, solid black panel with no distinguishing features.
description_view_2: The front view displays the control panel, beverage display, and stainless steel dispensing area, making it the interactive side.
description_view_3: The back of the coffee machine, featuring a plain, solid black panel similar to the sides.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A rectangular keypad with multiple buttons is located centrally below a beverage display, with a card or payment slot to the right.
